parameters.query:
SELECT
  COALESCE((
    SELECT jsonb_build_object(
      'skills', skills,
      'experience_years', experience_years,
      'education', education,
      'salary_min', salary_min,
      'salary_max', salary_max,
      'target_countries', target_countries,
      'availability', availability
    )
    FROM user_profiles
    ORDER BY profile_updated_date DESC NULLS LAST, created_at DESC NULLS LAST, id DESC
    LIMIT 1
  ), '{}'::jsonb) AS profile,
  jsonb_build_object('country', $1) AS country_cfg,
  ARRAY['senior','sr','staff','principal','lead','director','head','vp','chief','cto','ciso','engineering manager','software development manager','team manager']::text[] AS blocklist;
